# Webull OpenAPI Thai Lab

> Thai tutorial repository for learning Webull OpenAPI safely with Python.

This repository teaches setup, read-only account calls, market data calls,
order preview, and AI-assisted development workflows for Webull OpenAPI.
It is educational material, not a production trading system.

## Start Here

- [Agent guide](AGENTS.md): shared instructions for Claude, Codex, and other AI assistants.
- [Claude guide](CLAUDE.md): Claude-specific pointer to the shared guide.
- [README](README.md): user-facing overview, quick start, and learning path.
- [Learning path](docs/00-learning-path-th.md): Thai course sequence.
- [Beginner notebook](notebooks/webull_th_beginner.ipynb): cell-by-cell AAPL close price tutorial for `api.webull.co.th`.
- [Endpoint notebook index](notebooks/README.md): learning order for endpoint-split notebooks.
- [Quantopian-style research notebooks](notebooks/quantopian_style/README.md): Webull historical-bar research notebooks inspired by QuantopianDoc topics.

## Lessons

- [API key setup](docs/01-api-key-setup-th.md)
- [First API call](docs/02-first-call-th.md)
- [Market data](docs/03-market-data-th.md)
- [AAPL close notebook](notebooks/webull_th_beginner.ipynb)
- [Endpoint notebooks](notebooks/README.md)
- [Quantopian-style research notebooks](notebooks/quantopian_style/README.md)
- [Order preview and guardrails](docs/04-order-preview-and-guardrails-th.md)
- [AI-assisted Webull development](docs/05-ai-assisted-webull-dev-th.md)
- [GitHub publishing checklist](docs/99-publishing-github-th.md)

## Code Entry Points

- [Configuration](src/webull_lab/config.py)
- [SDK clients](src/webull_lab/clients.py)
- [Account helpers](src/webull_lab/account.py)
- [Market data helpers](src/webull_lab/market_data.py)
- [Order helpers](src/webull_lab/orders.py)
- [CLI](src/webull_lab/cli.py)
- [Notebook builder](scripts/build_webull_th_beginner_notebook.py)
- [Endpoint notebook builder](scripts/build_endpoint_notebooks.py)
- [Quantopian-style notebook builder](scripts/build_quantopian_style_notebooks.py)

## Safety Summary

- UAT is the default environment.
- Do not commit `.env`, Webull token files, app keys, app secrets, account IDs, or private data.
- Do not add default live-order placement behavior.
- Keep tests offline with fake clients.
- Verify with `python -m pytest -q` and `python -m ruff check .`.

## Official Sources

- Webull API Docs: https://developer.webull.com/apis/docs/
- Webull official llms.txt: https://developer.webull.com/apis/llms.txt
- Webull Python SDK: https://github.com/webull-inc/webull-openapi-python-sdk
